ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the rental location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the rental location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for the location */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the location */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the car brand */,
  "country_of_origin" TEXT /* Country where the brand is headquartered */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the car brand */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the car brand */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the car model */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car brand of the model */,
  "model_year" INTEGER /* Year the model was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the car model */,
  "engine_size" TEXT /* Engine size of the car model */,
  "fuel_efficiency" TEXT /* Fuel efficiency of the car model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_models_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES car_brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cars" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each car */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the car model */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the rental location */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number of the car */,
  "car_year" INTEGER /* Year the car was manufactured */,
  "number_of_doors" INTEGER /* Number of doors on the car */,
  "number_of_seats" INTEGER /* Number of seats in the car */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel the car uses (e.g., Petrol, Diesel) */,
  "transmission" TEXT /* Type of transmission (e.g., Manual, Automatic) */,
  "car_type_group" TEXT /* Group of car types (e.g., Car, Van) */,
  "car_type" TEXT /* Specific type of car (e.g., Small car, Luxury car) */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the car */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Condition of the car (e.g., good, average, poor) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the car */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Registration date of the car */,
  "insurance_expiration_date" TEXT /* Insurance expiration date of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES car_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cars_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the availability period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the availability period */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the car (e.g., Available, Reserved, Out of Service) */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date of the car */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_availability_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reservations" (
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reservation */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer making the reservation */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car being reserved */,
  "reservation_date" TEXT /* Date the reservation was made */,
  "pickup_date" TEXT /* Date the car is to be picked up */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Date the car is to be returned */,
  "total_cost" TEXT /* Total cost of the reservation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the reservation (e.g., Confirmed, Canceled) */,
  "pickup_location" TEXT /* Pickup location of the reservation */,
  "return_location" TEXT /* Return location of the reservation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reservations_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the customer resides */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the customer resides */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the customer */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the customer resides */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "loyalty_program_id" INTEGER /* Loyalty program ID of the customer */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Loyalty points of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_loyalty_program_id FOREIGN KEY ("loyalty_program_id") REFERENCES loyalty_programs ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation associated with the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Payment, Return) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Payment method used (e.g., Credit Card, Cash) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Completed, Pending) */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_transactions_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date the service was performed */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., Oil Change, Tire Rotation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the service performed */,
  "cost" TEXT /* Cost of the service */,
  "next_service_due" TEXT /* Date the next service is due */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_car_id FOREIGN KEY ("car_id") REFERENCES cars ("car_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the user's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the feedback */,
  "reservation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reservation being reviewed */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the feedback was created */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_reservation_id FOREIGN KEY ("reservation_id") REFERENCES reservations ("reservation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loyalty_programs" (
  "program_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loyalty program */,
  "program_name" TEXT /* Name of the loyalty program */,
  "program_description" TEXT /* Description of the loyalty program */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("program_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "provider_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for the insurance provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "car_insurance" (
  "car_id" INTEGER /* ID of the car */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the insurance provider */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number for the car */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the insurance policy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("car_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_car_insurance_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES insurance_providers ("provider_id")
)
